text.message: lol nbro i am just dead
robbed back to back with 0 points
red has 3 points and a dev
lay off the table talk please
am i wrong to say i have 2 points?
and got robbed back to back?
its annoying to say that with 2 devs in hand
no one will take that seriously\
and i have 4 points but no ore
lots of stuff to think about
ya you and red are definitely close
i know my 2 points is very scary
those back to back robs were atrocious
you had your chance to rob red but instead pulled me after i got fkd
ya cool when you do it but when someone else does?
i think it's just a lack of self awareness to rob me in that position then go to chat to complain i robbed back
how am i eating every single rob on a 3-9-11
red you should give them that trade
rolling first made a ton of senes
why are people so bad at the game?
no i am trying to 4:1 for a city
absolutely unfathomable that i was robbed as much as i was in the early game
i need some sort of leverage here
for a sheep or ore i'll do it
i have no use for wood
i'm gunna port it all away
at this point the connect doesnt give me
i'll trade it ot you on your turn
i guess i got scammed lol
you're leaving him on 9 points and not taking road
my only shot is settuig up a multi orbit play
don't you go to 9 points with 1 road?
